allow: Bash(node -e "const sqlite3 = require\('sqlite3'\).verbose\(\); const db = new sqlite3.Database\('data/app.db'\); db.run\('PRAGMA wal_checkpoint\(TRUNCATE\)', function\(err\) { if\(err\) { console.error\('ERROR:', err.message\); } else { console.log\('WAL checkpoint OK, changes:', this.changes\); } db.close\(\); }\);")
